name: ✨ Feature Request

---

## 🎯 Problem Statement
<!-- Is your feature request related to a problem? Add a clear and concise description -->
<!-- Example: "I'm always frustrated when..." -->

## 💡 Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe what you want to happen -->

## 🎨 Use Case
<!-- Describe a specific scenario where this feature would be useful -->

## 📋 Alternatives Considered
<!-- Have you thought about other solutions? List them here -->

## 📦 Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request -->

## 🛠️ Implementation Ideas
<!-- Optional: If you have technical ideas on how this could be implemented, share them -->
